hero.headline: Vignan Online MBA in Marketing: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with Marketing specialisation from Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. NAAC A+, NIRF #70 University 2025, Deemed University. Rs 90,000 total fee across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month. Sem 3-4 covers Integrated Marketing Communications, Services Marketing and CRM, Global Marketing, Digital Marketing and Data Analytics, and Retail Marketing and Brand Management.

sections.tldr: Vignan Online MBA Marketing: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, NIRF #70 University 2025. Rs 90,000 total fee (4 semesters). Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through Vignan. Sem 3-4 covers Integrated Marketing Communications, Services Marketing and CRM, Global Marketing, Digital Marketing and Data Analytics, B2B Marketing, and Retail Marketing and Brand Management. One of the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBAs in India with a dedicated marketing track.

about.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Marketing is offered by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research (VFSTR), a Deemed University established in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. VFSTR holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. NIRF ranks it #70 among universities in 2025.

The Marketing specialisation covers Integrated Marketing Communications, Services Marketing and CRM, Global Marketing, B2B Marketing, Digital Marketing and Data Analytics, and Retail Marketing and Brand Management across Semesters 3 and 4. The syllabus balances traditional marketing with digital analytics, covering both B2B and B2C marketing tracks.

At Rs 90,000 total, Vignan Online is among the cheapest UGC-DEB approved online MBAs with a marketing specialisation. The trade-off is limited brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and South India. For marketing professionals in FMCG, retail, services, and B2B sectors who need the MBA credential at minimum cost, Vignan Marketing is a practical option.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Environment and Strategy
sem3Subjects.description: Study the external business environment, strategic analysis frameworks, and formulation of competitive strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Project Management
sem3Subjects.description: Cover project planning, scheduling, resource allocation, risk management, and project execution methodologies.

sem3Subjects.name: Agricultural and Rural Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Examine marketing strategies for agricultural products, rural consumer behaviour, distribution in rural India, and agribusiness models.

sem3Subjects.name: Integrated Marketing Communications
sem3Subjects.description: Plan IMC campaigns across advertising, public relations, sales promotion, direct marketing, and digital channels for brand consistency.

sem3Subjects.name: Services Marketing and CRM
sem3Subjects.description: Study service quality models, customer relationship management systems, service delivery frameworks, and customer retention strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Open Elective
sem3Subjects.description: Choose from cross-functional electives offered by Vignan Online. Subject options confirmed at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Global Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Study international market entry strategies, export marketing, cross-cultural consumer behaviour, and global brand management.

sem4Subjects.name: B2B Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Cover organisational buying behaviour, industrial marketing strategy, key account management, and B2B pricing models.

sem4Subjects.name: Retail Marketing and Brand Management
sem4Subjects.description: Study retail formats, store management, visual merchandising, brand equity measurement, and brand portfolio strategy.

sem4Subjects.name: Digital Marketing and Data Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Cover SEO, SEM, social media marketing, email campaigns, web analytics, and data-driven marketing decision models.

sem4Subjects.name: Cross-Functional Elective
sem4Subjects.description: Choose from electives spanning other MBA specialisations. Subject options confirmed at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Master Thesis/Project
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied research project on a marketing topic with data collection, analysis, and presentation of findings.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Vignan Online MBA specialisations. See the main Vignan Online MBA page for the core subject list. Syllabus applies to the 2025-26 admission cycle. Reconfirm current syllabus with our counsellor before enrolment.

whoHires.body:
Marketing MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** FMCG, Retail and e-commerce, IT services (marketing divisions), Pharma marketing, Media and advertising, Telecom, Banking and insurance

**Entry-level roles:** Marketing Executive, Sales Executive, Brand Associate, Market Research Analyst, Digital Marketing Associate

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Marketing Manager, Brand Manager, Area Sales Manager, Key Account Manager, Digital Marketing Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Marketing, Head of Sales, Chief Marketing Officer, National Sales Head, Director of Brand Strategy

**Typical hiring organisations:** Hindustan Unilever, ITC, Nestle India, Asian Paints, Flipkart, Amazon India, Reliance Retail, Infosys (marketing), Wipro (corporate marketing), TCS, Samsung India, Dabur, Godrej Consumer

skills.body:
The Marketing specialisation builds skills tested by FMCG, retail, and B2B organisations:

**Technical skills:**
- Integrated Marketing Communications: campaign planning across ATL and BTL channels, media planning, PR strategy, and message consistency across platforms
- Services Marketing and CRM: service quality gap analysis, CRM tool configuration, customer lifetime value calculation, and retention programme design
- Digital Marketing and Data Analytics: SEO/SEM execution, social media campaign management, Google Analytics interpretation, and conversion funnel optimisation
- B2B Marketing: organisational buying cycle mapping, trade show strategy, key account planning, and industrial pricing models

**Applied skills:**
- Retail Marketing and Brand Management: store layout optimisation, brand equity tracking, brand extension evaluation, and retail promotion planning
- Global Marketing: export documentation, international market entry mode selection, and cross-cultural marketing adaptation

**Soft skills:** Sales pitch presentation, trade negotiation, cross-functional coordination with supply chain and finance teams, and market research findings presentation.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Vignan Online MBA Marketing against peers:

**vs MUJ Online MBA Marketing (Rs 1,80,000):** MUJ (Manipal University Jaipur) is 2x the cost with NIRF #52 and Manipal brand strength. MUJ offers stronger brand recognition at FMCG and MNC marketing teams. Vignan delivers NAAC A+ and UGC-DEB approval at half the fee.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA Marketing (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias is Rs 3,600 cheaper with NAAC A+ but no NIRF university rank. Both are budget options. Vignan's syllabus includes Digital Marketing and Data Analytics as a dedicated subject, giving slightly more digital coverage.

**vs Uttaranchal Online MBA Marketing (Rs 94,000):** Uttaranchal is Rs 4,000 more with NAAC A+. Both are in the sub-Rs 1 lakh category. Uttaranchal focuses on traditional sales and distribution. Vignan covers B2B marketing and global marketing with broader scope.

At Rs 90,000, Vignan is the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBA with a dedicated marketing track in this batch. The limitation is brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh.

fees.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Marketing is priced at Rs 90,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year programme). This makes Vignan Online among the most affordable UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research starting Rs 5,700 per month. No external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary involved.

**Additional charges**: Registration, application, examination, and project fees are not separately documented on Vignan Online's portal. Please reconfirm all charges with our counsellor before enrolment.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Vignan Online each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and all applicable charges with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the Marketing specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Vignan Online MBA Marketing students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Suresh
items.liked: Rs 90,000 for a NAAC A+ online MBA in Marketing is unbeatable value. The Digital Marketing and Data Analytics subject in Sem 4 was practical and current.
items.disliked: Career services for marketing roles are limited. No recruiter connections or job fairs for online MBA students.
items.body: I work in retail sales in Andhra Pradesh. The MBA credential helped me move from sales executive to assistant manager. The Integrated Marketing Communications subject gave me campaign planning frameworks I use at work. At Rs 90,000, the ROI was immediate. Just do not expect placement support from the university.

items.name: Priya
items.liked: Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month made budgeting easy. No hidden charges during the programme.
items.disliked: Brand recognition in Hyderabad IT corridors is limited. Colleagues with MBAs from Manipal or Amity got more interview calls for marketing manager roles.
items.body: Vignan is a strong university in Andhra Pradesh but the online MBA brand does not carry the same weight outside the state. For marketing roles at national FMCG or tech companies, the Vignan name needs explanation. If you are already employed and need the credential for internal promotion, it works well. For job switching to top companies, consider spending more on a recognised national brand.

items.name: Karthik
items.liked: B2B Marketing and Global Marketing subjects in Sem 4 were relevant for my industrial sales role. Affordable enough to pay upfront without any loan.
items.disliked: LMS interface could be smoother. Some recorded lectures had audio quality issues.
items.body: I manage B2B sales for a manufacturing company. The B2B Marketing subject covered organisational buying and key account management, which I apply directly. The Global Marketing subject added export marketing concepts useful for our international clients. For working professionals in Andhra Pradesh who want a quick, affordable MBA, Vignan delivers.

faqs.question: Is Rs 90,000 the total Vignan Online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. Rs 90,000 is the total programme fee spread across 4 semesters. Reconfirm any additional charges for registration, examination, or project with our counsellor before enrolment.

faqs.question: Does Vignan offer zero-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers zero-cost EMI directly at Rs 5,700 per month. No external NBFC or marketing partner is involved.

faqs.question: What is Vignan's NAAC grade?
faqs.answer: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research holds NAAC A+ accreditation. Verify the current status at naac.gov.in.

faqs.question: Does the Marketing specialisation cover digital marketing?
faqs.answer: Yes. Digital Marketing and Data Analytics is a dedicated Sem 4 subject covering SEO, SEM, social media marketing, and web analytics. It complements the traditional marketing subjects in Sem 3.

faqs.question: How does Vignan Marketing compare to MUJ Marketing on fees?
faqs.answer: Vignan Marketing costs Rs 90,000 total. MUJ Marketing costs approximately Rs 1,80,000. Vignan is half the price but MUJ offers stronger national brand recognition and NIRF #52 ranking.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in Marketing at Rs 90,000 total fee.
You work in sales, retail, or B2B marketing and need the MBA credential for promotion at your current organisation.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through the university with no NBFC intermediary.
consider: If brand recognition at national FMCG or MNC marketing teams matters, MUJ (Rs 1,80,000, NIRF #52) carries more weight.
If you want a similarly priced alternative, Galgotias (Rs 86,400, NAAC A+) is Rs 3,600 cheaper.
If you want an even broader marketing syllabus with sales and distribution focus, Uttaranchal (Rs 94,000, NAAC A+) is another budget option.
